records.stderr_pattern: Your Ruby version is .* but your Gemfile specified|ruby version.*is not available
records.description: Ruby version mismatch — unset RBENV_VERSION or force platform

records.stderr_pattern: Bundler could not find compatible versions for gem "bundler"|requires a different version of Bundler
records.description: Bundler version mismatch — install required bundler version

reproduction.expected_stderr_match: different version of Bundler|compatible versions for gem .bundler.
reproduction.fix_command: bash -c 'echo "ran: gem install bundler && bundle install (simulated)"; exit 0'
